headline: Texas Roadhouse is testing delivery, report says
summary: The longtime delivery holdout is testing first-party delivery via DoorDash in a few locations, according to Deutsche Bank.

headline: DoorDash teams with Shopify on delivery for small retailers
summary: DoorDash has synced its marketplace with the Shopify app to enable small retailers with stores to utilize its on-demand delivery network. The post DoorDash teams with Shopify on delivery for small retailers appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: Coco Robotics Brings Autonomous Delivery to Washington, D.C.
summary: Coco Robotics, the world's leading urban robot delivery platform, today announced the expansion of its operations in Washington, D.C., with customer deliveries beginning this summer. The launch represents Coco's latest expansion into one of the nation's most dynamic urban markets, helping neighborhood restaurants and retailers serve more customers with efficient and reliable delivery - while reducing traffic, emissions, and curbside congestion.

headline: DoorDash launches Shopify integration for independent US retailers
summary: According to DoorDash, the self-serve mechanism, embedded within the existing Shopify interface, cuts the time needed to go live from several weeks to a matter of days.
